TVスタジオ物語

Manage your own TV studio and create hit programs! Select genres and themes, cast talented hosts, and design studio sets to boost ratings. Each program you produce earns viewership ratings and SNS buzz, which unlock new content and talent. Balance talent skills with set design to create synergy and achieve high ratings. Reach 1000 fans to win by producing successful shows and building your studio empire!

Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and move cursor | Space: Confirm selection / Place set piece | Z: Cancel / Go back | Shift: Toggle between planning modes | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart game
